Dramatic Transformations

See the incredible results of our professional pool cleaning and restoration services

Before

After

Green to Clean Transformation

This residential pool had been neglected for months, with severe algae growth and equipment failure. Our team performed a complete restoration including algae treatment, equipment repair, and chemical rebalancing.

Algae removal and shock treatment
Filter system repair and replacement
Complete water chemistry rebalancing

Timeline: 3 days | Service: Emergency restoration

Before

After

Commercial Pool Revival

This hotel pool required extensive tile cleaning, calcium deposit removal, and complete water treatment to restore it to guest-ready condition.

Professional tile cleaning and restoration
Calcium deposit removal
Water clarification and sanitization

Timeline: 5 days | Service: Commercial restoration

Featured Projects

Highlighting some of our most challenging and rewarding pool restoration projects

Commercial 2024

Resort Pool Complex Overhaul

Complete renovation of a 5-pool resort complex including lap pools, spa, and children's area. This project involved equipment upgrades, tile restoration, and establishing new maintenance protocols.

50,000
Gallons
14
Days

Project Highlights

  • Complete filtration system upgrade
  • Energy-efficient LED lighting installation
  • Automated chemical management system
Residential 2024

Historic Mansion Pool Restoration

Careful restoration of a 1920s mansion pool while preserving original architectural details. Required specialized techniques for vintage tile work and historic-appropriate equipment.

25,000
Gallons
21
Days

Project Highlights

  • Historic tile restoration and re-grouting
  • Period-appropriate equipment concealment
  • Fountain feature restoration
